members.name: GetJointFlags
members.summary: Returns flags about the validity of the tracking data for the given body joint.

members.name: GetJointTransform
members.summary: Returns the transform for the given body joint.

members.name: SetJointFlags
members.signature: public void SetJointFlags(int joint, int flags)
members.summary: Sets flags about the validity of the tracking data for the given body joint.

members.name: SetJointTransform
members.signature: public void SetJointTransform(int joint, Transform3D transform)
members.summary: Sets the transform for the given body joint.

members.name: BodyFlags
members.summary: The type of body tracking data captured.

members.name: HasTrackingData
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the body tracking data is valid.
